channel.title: Ai on 2 More Weeks
channel.description: Recent content in Ai on 2 More Weeks

item.title: Apple Sues OpenAI Over Trade Secrets, Ive-Designed Phone Two Weeks From Court
item.description:
Apple filed a lawsuit on Friday against OpenAI alleging trade secret theft and breach of contract, the iPhone maker said in a complaint filed in the U.S. District Court for the Northern District of California.

The Allegations

Apple alleges the misconduct — which it says reveals “a pattern of theft” by former Apple employees now at OpenAI — was directed by OpenAI’s senior leadership, including Chief Hardware Officer Tang Tan, who spent 24 years at Apple most recently as VP of product design for the iPhone and Apple Watch. The suit accuses Tan of using Apple’s confidential project code names during recruiting, asking candidates to bring Apple hardware components to interviews, and coaching departing employees on how to evade Apple’s security procedures.

item.title: OpenAI Ships The Model That Changes Everything, Which Is To Say The Previous One Did Not
item.description:
On 8 July 2026, OpenAI released GPT-Live, a real-time voice model now powering ChatGPT Voice and built, the company said, to handle interruptions the way a patient person might. The launch arrived alongside the broader rollout of the GPT-5.6 family — models named, with a certain cosmological confidence, Sol, Terra, and Luna. The 2weeker Administration has reviewed the announcements and finds them consistent with every previous announcement.

Each was, of course, the one that changes everything.
